mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_messages (session_id, sender_type, content, send_time , sender_id) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role.name()}, #{content}, #{sendTime} , #{senderId})
INSERT INTO ai_chat_sessions (session_id, user_id, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted});
INSERT INTO ai_chat_sessions (session_id , create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{sessionId} , #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted});
mapper.select: SELECT session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, title, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM ai_chat_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC;
SELECT msg_id, session_id, -- 需要保留，用于映射到 chatSession.sessionId sender_id, sender_type, content, send_time FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY send_time ASC;
SELECT session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, title, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM ai_chat_sessions WHERE session_id = #{sessionId};
